name: Community Redevelopment Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Community Redevelopment, Inc. was incorporated in the State of Oklahoma on August 16 th , 2010, under the name Crosswind Renewable Energy Corp. At the time of its creation, the Company had been engaged in marketing renewable energy, sales, and marketing of turbines, lighting, and solar energy sources. On July 6 th , 2020, the company completed a transaction whereby changing the core business of the Company which is now that of the newly merged business called Community Redevelopm...
